name: Ken's Fresh Fish
tagline: Takeout-only, tiny, and almost impossible to find — the ahi katsu here is possibly the single best dish on the entire North Shore.
mustOrder: Ahi katsu — panko-crusted seared ahi, rare inside, possibly the best thing on the North Shore
Fresh poke — made daily from locally caught fish
Marlin tacos — unique preparation you won't find anywhere else
parking: Small gravel lot next to the shop
talkStory: Run by fisherman Ken, who catches much of what he serves. This tiny takeout window in Laie started as a way to sell his daily catch directly to the community, and word spread through the North Shore surf network.
insiderTips: Tue/Wed/Fri 11am–4pm, Sat 11am–5pm. No seating — takeout only. Call ahead to check if they're open and what's fresh. The menu changes based on the catch. Go early — once it's gone, it's gone.
